title: tragacantha sphaerocarpa
intro: Tragacantha sphaerocarpa, also known as the globe thistle, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health due to its saponin content. The health benefits of Tragacantha sphaerocarpa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, lower cholesterol levels, and act as an antiseptic agent. The herbal preparations of Tragacantha sphaerocarpa typically involve the use of its flowers and leaves in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
